evals.prompt: Can you review the presentation at presentations/HCP-Terraform-Agentic-Control-Plane.pptx? I want to make sure the slides look clean and professional before I present at our team meeting.
evals.expected_output: A structured review covering automated findings (contrast issues, overlaps, alignment) plus qualitative observations about visual quality, variety, and readability. Should mention the WCAG AA failures on slide 6 and flag the limited slide variety.

evals.prompt: I need to check if my HCP Terraform deck at presentations/HCP-Terraform-Agentic-Control-Plane.pptx meets accessibility standards — specifically color contrast. Can you check it?
evals.expected_output: A focused accessibility review highlighting the WCAG AA failures (slide 6: #e0e0e0 on #a56eff and #e0e0e0 on #009d9a) and the AAA-level warnings across multiple slides. Should include specific color fix recommendations.

evals.prompt: anything wrong with these slides? presentations/HCP-Terraform-Agentic-Control-Plane.pptx — they feel kind of samey and cluttered but I can't put my finger on it
evals.expected_output: Review that validates the user's intuition about sameyness (only 3 slide types, diagram-heavy) and clutter (multiple slides have 17-23 shapes, 90%+ coverage). Should suggest specific variety improvements and simplification strategies.
